<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp9="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Ultimate Spider-Man Omnibus Vol. 5 (2026)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-5-2026/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-5-2026/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Sat, 06 Jun 2026 23:12:08 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Marvel Comics</category>
		<category>Non 0-Day</category>
		<category>TPB</category>
		<category>Ultimate Spider-man</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 2.3 GB</p>
<p>Brace yourself for one of the most tragic and impactful moments in comic-book history as the Spider-Man of the Ultimate Universe gives his life for the ones he loves! Eisner Award-winning writer Brian Michael Bendis spun the tale of young Peter Parker for more than ten years. Under his pen, the neophyte Spider-Man blossomed from an awkward and gangly schoolboy into a tried-and-true hero, an inspiration to a world of ultimate wonder. But all stories must come to an end. And as shadows gather, villains plot and heroes clash, Peter’s final story will unfold. It’s the death of Spider-Man, and the ending will shock you! Plus: Bendis unites with some of the biggest talents in comic books to team up Spider-Man with fellow Ultimate heroes — everyone from Iron Man and Wolverine to Shang-Chi and the Man-Thing! COLLECTING: Ultimate Spider-Man (2009) 150-160, Ultimate Fallout (2011) 1, Ultimate Marvel Team-Up (2001) 1-16, Ultimate Spider-Man Super Special (2002) 1; material from Ultimate Fallout (2011) 2, 4, 6</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-5-2026/">Ultimate Spider-Man Omnibus Vol. 5 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
		
					<wfw:commentRss>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-5-2026/feed/</wfw:commentRss>
			<slash:comments>0</slash:comments>
		
		
		<wp9:post-id>398535</wp9:post-id>	</item>
items.title: Ultimate Spider-Man Omnibus Vol. 5 (2026)

<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp9="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Ultimate Spider-Man Omnibus Vol. 4 (2024)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-4-2024/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-4-2024/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Sat, 06 Jun 2026 23:10:56 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Marvel Comics</category>
		<category>Non 0-Day</category>
		<category>Spider-man</category>
		<category>TPB</category>
		<category>Ultimate Spider-man</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2024 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 3.0 GB</p>
<p>With new artistic collaborators, Brian Michael Bendis shakes up the Ultimate Spider-Man's world! The Green Goblin escapes from prison - and he wants Peter Parker dead. Can Spidey's friends help him fend off the Goblin's vengeance-crazed attack? Meanwhile, one of Peter's classmates makes a startling discovery: She's a mutant! But when family secrets come to light, she may be forced to join Magneto's Brotherhood! Then symbiotes return - and as Venom takes on Carnage, Gwen Stacy's life hangs in the balance! And life will change forever when Magneto issues a terrifying Ultimatum and unleashes a tidal wave on Manhattan. Amid the chaos, villains see opportunity - and the up-and-coming Mysterio targets Spider-Man for elimination by any means necessary! Will a sinister imposter damage Peter's life beyond repair? Collecting ULTIMATE SPIDER-MAN (2000) #112-133 and ANNUAL #3, ULTIMATUM: SPIDER-MAN REQUIEM #1-2, and ULTIMATE SPIDER-MAN (2009) #1-15.</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-4-2024/">Ultimate Spider-Man Omnibus Vol. 4 (2024)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
		
					<wfw:commentRss>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-spider-man-omnibus-vol-4-2024/feed/</wfw:commentRss>
			<slash:comments>0</slash:comments>
		
		
		<wp9:post-id>360068</wp9:post-id>	</item>

		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 49 MB</p>
<p>THE ULTIMATE UNIVERSE'S LEGACY LIVES ON! MILES MORALES returned from the Ultimate Universe with a plan: safeguard the ORIGIN BOXES — catalysts for the creation of new super heroes — before they fall into the wrong hands! But the secret is out as Miles' battle over the boxes engulfs the entire Marvel U! This May, Chris Condon (ULTIMATE WOLVERINE) and Stefano Caselli (ULTIMATE BLACK PANTHER) team up to create stunning and unforgettable new characters on both sides of a conflict that will shape the future of the 616!</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-impact-reborn-1-2026/">Ultimate Impact &#8211; Reborn #1 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
